scripts.build: npx webpack --mode=production && npx mkdirp target && npx j2w -i dist.js -d combined-wit -n combined -o target/{{project-name | kebab_case}}.wasm {% if enable-aot == 'y' or enable-aot == 'Y' %}--aot{% endif %}

yarn exec webpack -- --mode=production && yarn exec mkdirp -- target && yarn exec j2w -- -i dist.js -d combined-wit -n combined -o target/{{project-name | kebab_case}}.wasm {% if enable-aot == 'y' or enable-aot == 'Y' %}--aot{% endif %}
